Options Choose among our four offerings: Plan A Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $50,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $2,000 Plan B Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $100,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $4,000 Plan C Sum Insured for accidental death or permanent disablement: $200,000 Medical expenses for accidents: $6,000
Key Coverages Accidental death or permanent disablement pays a lump sum benefit.
